items.claim: Mitch Ramirez is not UFC caliber.
items.quote: I think Mitch Ramirez is um not UFC caliber

items.claim: Chase Hooper's jiu-jitsu is highly effective.
items.quote: Chase Hooper's armbars, guillotines, his jiu-jitsu is really nasty.

items.claim: Christian Leroy Duncan is twice as fast as Jared Cannonier.
items.quote: I think Christian Leroy Duncan's twice as fast, you know?

items.claim: Jared Cannonier looked lost in his fight against Michael Venom Page.
items.quote: Jared Cannonier was looking lost out there against Michael Venom Page.

items.claim: Christian Leroy Duncan has nice elbows and knees in the clinch.
items.quote: Christian Leroy Duncan's shown some nice elbows, nice knees.

items.claim: Deonna Barbosa is significantly larger than Anna Meliciano.
items.quote: She's outsized in her UFC debut against a Deonna Barbosa

items.claim: Deonna Barbosa has a proven ability to out-grapple UFC-caliber opponents.
items.quote: Deonna Barbosa who's been able to out grapple UFC caliber ladies.

items.claim: Dricus Du Plessis lacks the ability to stop chain wrestling.
items.quote: He can't or he didn't show an ability to stop chain wrestling

items.claim: Kamaru Usman is proficient at chain wrestling.
items.quote: Kamaru Usman can chain wrestle nicely.

items.claim: Dricus Du Plessis performs poorly when fighting off his back.
items.quote: And he looked terrible on his back.

items.claim: Paddy Pimblett is a superior submission grappler compared to Benoit Saint Denis.
items.quote: Paddy Pimblett's a much better submission grappler.
